column234: beard, hair style, body posture --> men. Long hair, soft skin, no body hair, body shape, face makeup --> women

I assessed gender presentation using visible, culturally coded cues across hair, face, and body. For hair and face, I noted length and styling, grooming, the presence of facial hair, makeup, and accessories. For body, I considered overall stature and proportions (e.g., shoulder-to-hip ratio) and the chest silhouette.
